page.title: Category:Architecture by Municipality in Kagawa Prefecture

revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「{{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|香川県|[[市町村]]別に分類した[[建築物]]|建築物 (市町村別)|建築物|*}} Category:...」
[[Special:Diff/74082270#Category:指標別分類系カテゴリ群の改名および貼り替え|Bot作業依頼]]: [[:Category:香川県の市町村別]]改名に伴うリンク修正 - [[User:cewbot/log/20190913|log]]

[[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] (2025-05-16T01:04:49Z): (Bot: update category metadata) [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:三豊市の建築物]]. [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] (2025-05-16T00:38:54Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata) [[Category:Made Tier 1 Categories]] This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:多度津町の建築物]]. revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Merge [[Category:日本の建築物 (市町村別)]] into [[Category:Architecture in Japan by Municipality]] via bot
Text replacement - "市町村別" to " by Municipality"
Merge [[Category:香川県の by Municipality]] into [[Category:Topics by Municipality in Kagawa Prefecture]] via bot
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Qq
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|香川県|[[市町村]]別に分類した[[建築物]]|建築物 (市町村別)|建築物|*}}
{{translated page|ja|Category:香川県の建築物 (市町村別)]]|version=74239785}} [[ja:Category:香川県の建築物 (市町村別)]]
==Old Content== ==Japanese Content== {{Template:Category:日本の都道府県/下位|香川県|[[市町村]]別に分類した[[建築物]]|建築物 ( by Municipality)|建築物|*}}
{{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:香川県の建築物 ( by Municipality)]]}}
==Old Content== (2025-05-16T01:16:20Z): (Bot: update category metadata)
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:多度津町の建築物]].
(2025-05-16T01:04:49Z): (Bot: update category metadata)
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[:Category:三豊市の建築物]].
(2025-05-16T00:38:54Z): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)

{{translated page|ja|Category:香川県の建築物 ( by Municipality)|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}

revision.comment: Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "[[建築物]]" to "[[Building]]s"
Text replacement - "[[市町村]]" to "{{ill|Municipalities in Japan|ja|市町村|ko|시정촌|zh|市町村}}"
Text replacement - "Category:日本の都道府県" to "Category:Prefectures of Japan"
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: remove non‑IW/non‑Category content
